prompt_queue.prompt: Industry: food and beverage. Generate one distinct, buildable store concept inside the food and beverage industry. Examples of valid sub-spaces: small-batch pantry, fermented goods, single-origin coffee, regional snack imports, sauces and condiments, baking supplies, non-alcoholic spirits, tea, specialty meat or seafood, cheese, candy, restaurant retail extensions. Stay inside food and beverage; do not drift into general gifts, kitchenware-only, or wellness.
